project.name: Hero: The SaaS Layer is Ready

data.label: Style
data.name: Noir Comic Book
data.description: Noir comic book illustration style. Heavy black ink lines, high contrast shading, cel-shaded shadows. Hand-drawn graphic novel aesthetic with bold outlines. Muted palette with selective color pops. Stylized, not photorealistic. No text, watermarks, speech bubbles, or white borders. Edge-to-edge composition filling the entire frame.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style, muted blacks and grays with selective amber and teal color pops. Developer at a desk with floating code fragments and connection lines reaching toward cloud icons that remain tantalizingly out of reach. The code blocks glow softly while the cloud services are rendered as distant neon-lit buildings in a foggy cityscape beyond the window. Strong contrast between the warm light of the workspace and the cool, unreachable infrastructure.
